title: Data and scripts for Bulk Compaction and Apparent Porosity Change During Shale Loading Revealed by In Situ (V)SANS
description: Data repository supporting the manuscript Bulk Compaction and Apparent Porosity Change During Shale Loading Revealed by In Situ (V)SANS. The archive includes stitched neutron-scattering curves for the loading states, processed pore-size-distribution outputs, neutron-derived structure-factor summaries, and related reduction and plotting scripts used for the pore-volume interpretation.
